untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detecting 'parabolic acceleration' with steepness comparison to trend slope, 'rejection candles' (multiple consecutive close<open), and 'demand collapse' — none of which can be precisely measured with the allowed indicators. Parabolic curvature detection, trend slope calculation, and demand vacuum identification are not available. Thresholds for steepness multiple, rejection count, volatility elevation in std dev units, and confirmation bars are unspecified (marked as [THRESHOLD_NEEDED]). Provided best-effort SHORT entry using elevated volatility + pause pattern + breakdown, but this is an approximation.
translation_notes: CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction means entries could be LONG or SHORT depending on prior trend direction—cannot express conditionally in this schema. Used hvol_20 > 0.03 as proxy for volatility elevation. Used small body + close below prev_low as proxy for pause/pullback followed by breakdown. Exit on close > sma_20 as reversal signal. Original signal emphasizes parabolic exhaustion which requires advanced curve-fitting analysis not available in indicator set.
